name: Angel Hair with Balsamic Tomatoes
recipeIngredient: 5 to 6 Roma tomatoes, chopped (28 oz. can plum tomatoes)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large skillet, sauté the minced garlic in olive oil over medium heat until lightly browned.
2. Remove the garlic from the skillet.
3. In a non-reactive bowl, combine the chopped tomatoes, salt, pepper, basil, and balsamic vinegar. Set aside for 10 minutes, stirring occasionally.
4. Bring a large pot of water to boil for cooking the pasta.
5. Just before adding the pasta to the boiling water, drain the tomatoes and reserve the juice that runs off (set the colander on a dinner plate).
6. Cook the angel hair pasta according to package instructions until al dente.
7. Heat the garlic skillet briefly over medium heat and toss the drained tomatoes until heated through, making sure they retain their shape.
8. Once the pasta is cooked, drain it and toss with the tomato mixture. Serve with freshly grated Parmesan cheese.
